text: 強化の手本を見せてくれ！

。実際にやってるところを
見てみたいんだけど
何か一つ武器を強化してきてくれないか？

※武器の強化で達成

Yo, <%me>.
Sorry, but I was wondering if you could teach me
something. I was thinking of trying weapon
enhancement, and I got some stuff prepped,
but then I just couldn’t figure it out. I think I
need to see the process in action. Could you
enhance a weapon and show me how it's done?

Note: Successfully enhance a weapon
